title: Australian Chicken Biryani
description: A hearty and flavorful Indian-inspired chicken biryani dish with Australian ingredients. This recipe serves 4-6 people and is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, turmeric, red chili powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute.
Add biriyani masala and cook for 1 minute.
Add rice and mix well. Cook for 2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a large saucepan and add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Turn off heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot garnished with fresh cilantro.
